evidence.notes: Industry-standard multi-platform token pipeline; DTCG-format parsing; custom format API is the designed extension point for the Dart output.

candidates.name: first-party Style Dictionary custom Dart format

evidence.notes: No adoptable candidate exists: gh search (tier 1) best hit 1-star demo (2024); all pub.dev token codegen packages are 1-like/pre-1.0/abandoned. Must emit explicit ColorScheme (never .fromSeed for brand colors), TextTheme, and a ThemeExtension<T> with copyWith/lerp, driven by an authored brand-to-Material semantic mapping.
Target shape already proven in apps/knowme-poc/desktop/src/index.css (@theme + body.light overrides) and by OpenDesign's token-first-tailwind migration.
Only needed if/when Figma or Tokens Studio becomes a token authoring source; not part of P0.
Mature but solves internal Flutter widget-theming consistency, not token import. Revisit only if a real widget-coverage gap appears (Rule 2).

candidates.name: design_builder / design_tokens_generator / design_tokens_builder / token_theme_kit / figma2flutter / style-dictionary-figma-flutter

evidence.notes: All low-adoption (typ. 1 like), pre-1.0 alpha, non-standard schemas, or abandoned (style-dictionary-figma-flutter last published 2022-05). Pattern references only; supply-chain risk as dependencies.

candidates.name: audit.sh extension + token-hash stamps in generated files

evidence.notes: Compiler stamps sha256 of design/tokens.json into generated headers; audit recomputes + compares; lints ban ColorScheme.fromSeed( and raw Color(0xFF...) outside generated files. Mirrors OpenDesign's guard pattern.
Standard Riverpod 3.3 codegen pattern; no additional package required.

candidates.name: existing od mcp server (pull) + design-systems/<brand>/ plugin entry (attach)

evidence.notes: Pull via get_artifact/get_file works today, zero fork changes. Attach = one additive design-systems entry (open-design.json + DESIGN.md) following the existing ~150-entry convention; DESIGN.md becomes a generated compiler output. Bidirectional push and KB/wiki manifest fields DEFERRED - verified unsupported by docs/plugins-spec.md (daemon-only writes; od.context has exactly 7 fields).

openQuestions: Semantic brand-to-Material mapping location in tokens.json ($extensions vs sibling mapping block)
Compiler invocation point (root pnpm script vs desktop/; run at scaffold time recommended)
rem-to-dp fixed mapping policy (1rem=16dp recommended, divergence documented)
Retrofit apps/knowme-poc/mobile in this phase (recommended: yes, as the worked example)
